# Test Fixtures

Shared test data for the HCI platform test suites.

## Contents

- Sample Mantic Point webhook payloads (external format)
- Canonical event fixtures for each approved event type
- Multi-tenant test data (multiple TMCs, corporates, travellers)
- Edge case data (out-of-order PNRs, partial segments, orphan bookings)
- Business rule test scenarios (mapped to BR-xxx rule IDs)
